summary: Slice 1 walking skeleton + round-1 review fixes. Built: `gogo run [<slug>]` + cli/internal/orchestrator (warm dev via claude -p --resume, fresh review/test, contract.Route track-aware routing, total-per-feature round bound + cost ceiling that gate, CLI-owned registry, --attach) + launch.PhaseArgs/RunPhase + contract.ReadResult/Route + the FR11 --in-session flag. Fixed review round 1 (REV-001..005): track-aware Route (review batches minors, test any); is_error + no-output false-green guards; implementGate on warm fix rounds; pre-flight cost gate + split decision/budget gates; needs-user-decision scan across all fields; documented total-per-feature bound. All cli tests green with -race; gofmt + vet clean. FR10/FR12/FR13 deferred.
